summary: A printing hub web app called 'Nellore Printing Hub' (sponsored by Magic Advertising) with customer login, admin dashboard, quotation requests, Telugu/English bilingual support, gallery, and home page visuals.
architectural_notes: App name is 'Nellore Printing Hub', permanently sponsored by Magic Advertising
Bilingual support required: Telugu and English with user-facing language toggle
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Vibrant hero banner for a printing business with bold typography, ink splashes, and warm orange-red accent colors on a dark background (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- 'Sponsored by Magic Advertising' footer badge with a small magic wand icon and elegant typography on a transparent background (magic-advertising-badge.dim_320x64.png)

existing_features.title: On the 'Request A Quotation' page (QuotationRequestPage.tsx), remove the file attachment input entirely. Replace it with a clearly labeled radio button or toggle option asking: 'Is your design ready?' with two choices — 'Yes, my design is ready' and 'No, I need design assistance'. Store this selection in the quotation submission payload using an appropriate field (e.g., designStatus: 'ready' | 'needed').

In AdminLoginPage.tsx, after a successful email/password login (verifyAuthentication returns success), immediately redirect the user to the Admin Dashboard page (/admin/dashboard or equivalent admin dashboard route) instead of any intermediate or default page.

Improve the overall customer-facing UX and visual appeal of the app to make it more attractive, easier to use, and shareable. Apply the following enhancements: (1) Add a prominent, visually appealing 'Share This App' call-to-action on the Home page using the existing ShareAppButton component. (2) Improve the hero section on HomePage.tsx with a bold tagline, a clear call-to-action button, and vibrant accent colors consistent with the existing print-industry theme. (3) Add smooth hover and tap animations to service cards, gallery items, and navigation elements. (4) Improve button styling across all customer-facing pages for consistency — use filled primary buttons for main actions and outline/ghost for secondary actions. (5) On the customer portal and quotation pages, display friendly status messages and progress indicators to guide customers through the order journey. (6) Add a 'Sponsored by Magic Advertising' footer badge or text on all pages in a visually subtle but permanent manner.

Ensure a fully functional and prominent language switch between English and Telugu is available on all pages. The LanguageToggle component should be visible in both the header (Layout.tsx) and the bottom navigation or a fixed floating position on mobile. Ensure all customer-facing pages — including QuotationRequestPage, CustomerLoginPage, CustomerRegistrationPage, CustomerPortalPage, HomePage, ServicesPage, ContactUsPage, and TestimonialsPage — use translations from LanguageContext and display correctly in both languages. Add any missing translation keys to both en.ts and te.ts.

Set the permanent app branding to 'Nellore Printing Hub' everywhere it appears: browser tab title (index.html), Layout header logo text, HomePage hero, About page, and any other visible app name instances. Add 'Sponsored by Magic Advertising' as a permanent subtitle or badge in the footer of Layout.tsx, visible on every page. This branding must not be editable by admins and must appear consistently in both language modes.

new_feature_requests.summary: On 'Request A Quotation' form, remove file attachment and replace with an option asking if customer design is ready or needs to be created
After successful login with correct email and password, redirect owner to Admin Dashboard
Improve UX/UI to make the app more attractive, user-friendly, and shareable for customers
Add two language versions (Telugu and English) with a language switch option
Set app name to 'Nellore Printing Hub' with 'Sponsored by Magic Advertising' branding permanently
